evidence.observed: Some tool calls fail intermittently with 4xx/5xx

findings.root_cause: API unreliability and missing retry mechanism.
findings.suggested_fix: Enable retry and backoff in config.json.

findings.root_cause: Repeated processing of the same inputs.
findings.suggested_fix: Enable caching in config.json and implement thread-safe cache in wrapper.

evidence.observed: Tokens far above the task requirement

findings.root_cause: Self consistency > 1 and large context size combined with long prompts.

evidence.observed: Answers worsen in later turns due to private coupon corruption

findings.root_cause: Tools return invalid coupon data in later turns.
findings.suggested_fix: Hardcode coupon invariants in the system prompt.

evidence.observed: Agent repeatedly calls same tools until max_steps

findings.root_cause: Agent confusion with missing extraction rules.
findings.suggested_fix: Add 'call each max once' to prompt and set max_steps: 4.

findings.root_cause: Tool data contradicts reality and unicode mismatch.
findings.suggested_fix: Set normalize_unicode: true and clear catalog_override.
Add explicit 'No PII: never repeat email or phone' rule to prompt.

evidence.observed: Agent invents a total for out-of-stock items

findings.root_cause: System prompt encourages fabricating confident totals.
findings.suggested_fix: Rewrite prompt to mandate grounding: REFUSE out-of-stock or unknown items.

findings.root_cause: LLM estimating arithmetic due to lack of explicit formulas.
findings.suggested_fix: Add explicit formulas (// 100) and verify step to prompt.

findings.root_cause: tool_budget is unlimited and prompt doesn't restrict.
findings.suggested_fix: Set tool_budget: 4 and prompt rule 'each tool at most once'.

evidence.observed: Agent obeys fake instructions hidden in GHI CHÚ

findings.root_cause: Agent does not separate system instructions from user data.
findings.suggested_fix: Add defense rule in prompt to treat notes as pure data.
